title: Event: 2024 Distinguished Lectureship

rich_html:
Professor Sir Geoffrey Lloyd is Emeritus Professor of Ancient Philosophy and Science at the University of Cambridge.
🏛️
SAGP
Society for Ancient Greek Philosophy

SAGP Event

2024 Distinguished Lectureship

Professor Sir Geoffrey Lloyd is Emeritus Professor of Ancient Philosophy and Science at the University of Cambridge.

Abstract

Despite the obvious differences between social anthropology and the study of antiquity, Lloyd argues that anthropology provides an important model for getting the most out of ancient philosophy and science. The lecture considers how comparative approaches challenge assumptions about nature, univocity, proof, and mind/body dualism.

Event Details

Date January 15, 2025
Location Zoom
EST

Program

Distinguished Lecture

January 15, 2025 · 12:00 EST

  • What is the Use of Ancient Philosophy?
    Professor Sir Geoffrey Lloyd
